nodes.label: Sync Changelog Retention Pruner (RIZ-72)
nodes.rationale: internal/sync.Pruner ticker goroutine prunes the sync_changelog outbox: rows older than SYNC_CHANGELOG_MAX_AGE (default 90 days — comfortably bounds the commit-ordered pull cursor's xid8 wraparound-safety window while giving dormant devices a grace period) are deleted in bounded batches (default 5000/tick) so one tick never holds a long transaction. Each batch's furthest (xid8, server_seq) is recorded transactionally in sync_changelog_horizon; GET /v1/sync/changes rejects a cursor strictly below the horizon with 410 Gone (cursor-expired) so pruning never silently skips changes — clients reset the cursor and re-pull, which is safe because pulls are idempotent.

edges.source_location: 'see Sync protocol' links, Device Restore from Backup recovery path
